titles.title: Only Jesus Can Heal This Hurting World

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This world will not get better on its own More problems each day and we're losing sight of hope We need to admit, we can't fix what's going wrong But there's someone who can do what we've needed all along

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Only Jesus can heal this hurting world Only Jesus can heal this hurting world No one can love like he does, Heart by heart and one by one Only Jesus can heal this hurting world

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In every corner of the planet is the same We can't get along because we don't know how to change No plan formed by man can set us free inside But the prince of peace can reach our wounded hearts and minds

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There's a bridge between us His heart will forgive us The pain that conquers darkness The only one that can save us

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Only Jesus can heal this hurting world Only Jesus can heal this hurting world No one can love like he does, Heart by heart and one by one Only Jesus can heal this hurting world Every man, woman, boy, and girl Only Jesus can heal this hurting world
